releaseNotes: Critical fixes: Local LLM install button in Profile, store items now have real prices, version migration system prevents crash-on-update. Starting credits increased to 100.

notes: Fixed Local LLM — prominent Install AI Model button in Profile (no more confusing 'optional' field)
Fixed Store — all items now have real prices (15-200 NC based on tier), starting credits raised to 100
Fixed update crash — version migration system auto-cleans stale localStorage on version change
Lowered level requirements on store items so new users can buy from level 1
Removed 'Model (optional)' field from Electron LLM panel (model is auto-configured)
Store preview modal — full overview, training plan, quests, and deliverables before purchase
PDF training guide download after buying any protocol or book (jsPDF generated)
Rich content for all 11 protocols and 8 books (week-by-week plans, form cues, progression rules)
Sound effects system (task complete, quest complete, level up, achievement, penalty)
Achievement burst animation with full-screen trophy reveal and particle effects
Stat radar chart, habit completion donut, and EXP/NC ratio bar in Mission Debrief
Data export/import (JSON backup and restore)
Keyboard shortcuts (arrow keys, 1-8 for tabs, P for profile)
App icon for Electron build and Windows taskbar
Penalty Zone removed (was orphaned and never triggered)
Changelog panel connected to GitHub Gist (same source as Check for Updates)
Shadow Chat professional UI redesign with LLM status indicator and persona dropdown
First-time tutorial — 8-step onboarding guide for new users
Mission Debrief: monthly (12-month) and yearly (4-year) reports with bar charts
Store system overhaul — level-gated items with lock overlays and higher prices
EXP formula changed to n³ × 20, rank thresholds compressed
All rewards (NC, EXP) reduced ~3x for balanced progression
Ranks removed from display — only Level shown
Dummy fallback tasks removed — daily tasks generated only from real protocols
Achievement unlock burst animation
Data export/import (JSON backup)
Keyboard shortcuts for tab navigation
Shadow Chat persona selector — 6 voices (Mirror, Mentor, Rival, Commander, Confidant, Strategist)
First-launch LLM download prompt with progress bar
CPU-only inference via node-llama-cpp — WebGPU ModelLoader removed
Shadow Chat memory now persists to localStorage and injects into LLM system prompt
Website overhaul: 3D hologram, scroll animations, hex graph, 6 AI agents section
Model: Qwen2.5-2B-Instruct (Q4_K_M, ~1.5 GB) from HuggingFace
Effort-mirror tone: Sync to Log.
3-of-7 streak window with rest tokens.
SAGE, TITAN, CHRONOS, MANAGER domain-stat badges.
Mission Debrief tab.
Changelog panel.
Manual update button in main menu.
Logout clears all data.
Splash boot animation.
3-section HabitLab.
Multi-agent orchestrator wiring.
Initial public release of NEXUS Self-Evolution.
6 stats, 24 components, multi-agent AI orchestration.
Auto-update from GitHub Gist.
